text:
Trump is erasing history in front of your eyes:

- White House website rewrites Jan 6 as a peaceful protest
- Ordered National Parks to remove climate change and Native American history
- Removed the slavery memorial at George Washington's house
- Banned teaching about systemic racism in schools
- Installed insulting plaques beneath past presidents' portraits
- Renamed the Department of Defense to "Department of War"

Those who control the past control the future.
